mapper.insert: INSERT INTO query_history ( query_no, user_id, datasource_id, question, prompt_version, model_name, model_output, generated_sql, executed_sql, status, error_message, duration_ms, row_count, chart_type, result_summary ) VALUES ( #{queryNo}, #{userId}, #{datasourceId}, #{question}, #{promptVersion}, #{modelName}, #{modelOutput}, #{generatedSql}, #{executedSql}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{durationMs}, #{rowCount}, #{chartType}, #{resultSummary} )
